name: code-owners
description: CODEOWNERS management — sync, query ownership, search by owner, create/update/delete entries, find unowned files

sync.description: Fetch and parse CODEOWNERS files from all indexed repos (or a specific repo)

get.description: Find owners for a file path in a repo (last matching CODEOWNERS rule wins)

path.description: File path to check ownership for

create.description: Create/upload a CODEOWNERS file for a repo — parses content, validates format, and stores rules in SQLite

file.description: Path to a local CODEOWNERS file to upload

content.description: CODEOWNERS content as a string (used if --file is not provided)

update.description: Update an existing CODEOWNERS file for a repo — replaces all existing rules with new content

file.description: Path to the updated CODEOWNERS file

content.description: Updated CODEOWNERS content as a string (used if --file is not provided)

delete.description: Delete a CODEOWNERS file entry and all its rules for a repo from the local database

repo.description: Repository name to remove from the database

search.description: Find all patterns and repos owned by a person or team

repo.description: Limit search to a specific repo

list-repos.description: List repos that have CODEOWNERS files with rule counts and last-synced times

list-owners.description: List all known owners across all repos with rule counts

unowned.description: Find files with no CODEOWNERS coverage in a repo

repo.description: Repository name to check for unowned files

health.description: Check Sourcegraph connectivity and database state
